model_comparison: Model 1 demonstrates superior quality in the paralinguistic feature '冷漠疏离' (Cold and Detached). Although Model 1 has a very minor text omission ('事' instead of '事情'), its prosodic features—specifically the slower tempo, flatter pitch, and deliberate pauses—create a much stronger sense of emotional distance and coldness compared to Model 2. Model 2 is content-perfect but its tone leans more towards 'casual' or 'dismissive' rather than 'cold and alienated'.
